purpose: Product centered on pure white or black, no shadows, no styling. E-commerce catalog shot.

subject_description.description: The subject (product, person, scene) to be rendered

background_treatment.description: Background color or tone direction (resolved from brand fingerprint if not provided)

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: {product_descriptor} centered on pure {background_tone} seamless background, completely flat lighting with no shadows, even illumination from all sides, product fills 60% of frame, perfect symmetry, catalog photography style, hyper-realistic surface detail, ultra-sharp focus, e-commerce quality, no text, no watermark, no props {cultural_constraints_injection}
notes: Intents: grow, harvest. Source code in research corpus: T02. Saudi adaptation guidance: Critical chain for brands selling via Salla, Zid, Maroof Saudi e-commerce platforms. Reference image: Required (recommended). Recommended frequency: On demand.
